productDisplayName: Nike Men Arsenal Authe White T-Shirts
description: Composition White crew neck t-shirt made of 100% cotton, with short sleeves, fabric tape on inseam of the neckline, graphic print on the chest and nike swoosh on left sleeve Fitting Regular Wash care Machine wash cold with like colours Do not use softeners or bleach Tumble dry low Remove immediately / do not allow to lay on itself when wet Do not iron or dry clean Wear the Arsenal football Club Authentic men's Soccer t-shirt like a badge of honour. A signature team design that remixes iconic Gunners' graphics to create an intimidating icon, the Arsenal FC T-Shirt is a must-have for fans and players alike.
